---
name: Source update
description: Request update, verification, expiry handling, or retirement for a source document.
title: "Source update: "
labels: [source-update]
---

## Source
- Source id:
- Title:
- Current status: verified / unverified / historical / draft / expired
- Owner:
- Reviewer:

## Update type
- [ ] Verify source
- [ ] Set reviewAfter / expiresAt
- [ ] Mark historical or expired
- [ ] Replace with newer source
- [ ] Retire source and dependent content

## Review metadata
- verifiedAt:
- reviewAfter:
- expiresAt:
- reviewRisk: low / medium / high

## Linked content to check
List linked cards, checklists, training paths, protection measures, or glossary terms. Use the generated coverage report for orphaned links.

## Notes
Do not include local filesystem paths, restricted shelter locations, patient data, or private operational records.
